title: potentilla bifurca var. typica
intro: Potentilla bifurca var. typica, also known as the Alpine Cinquefoil, is a flowering plant species in the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Alpine Cinquefoil can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
